description: x402 pay-per-use IBM Granite AI: chat, code, embeddings, analysis, forecasting. Pay USDC per call.
name: io.github.nirholas/ibm-x402-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Solana wallet address that receives USDC payments from tool callers (server operator's receiving wallet). Required to accept x402 payments.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_SVM_PAYMENT_ADDRESS

environmentVariables.description: IBM Cloud API key used by the server to call watsonx.ai on behalf of end users. Create one at https://cloud.ibm.com/iam/apikeys.
environmentVariables.name: WATSONX_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: watsonx.ai project id scoping all inference calls. Find it under your project → Manage → General → Project ID. Provide this or WATSONX_SPACE_ID.
environmentVariables.name: WATSONX_PROJECT_ID

environmentVariables.description: watsonx.ai deployment space id. Alternative to WATSONX_PROJECT_ID.
environmentVariables.name: WATSONX_SPACE_ID

environmentVariables.description: Regional watsonx.ai inference host. Defaults to https://us-south.ml.cloud.ibm.com. Other regions: eu-de, eu-gb, jp-tok, au-syd, ca-tor.
environmentVariables.name: WATSONX_URL

environmentVariables.description: Default chat/generation Granite model id. Defaults to ibm/granite-3-8b-instruct.
environmentVariables.name: WATSONX_MODEL_ID

environmentVariables.description: Default embedding model id. Defaults to ibm/granite-embedding-278m-multilingual.
environmentVariables.name: WATSONX_EMBED_MODEL_ID

environmentVariables.description: Solana account that sponsors transaction fees for x402 payments. Defaults to the three.ws fee payer.
environmentVariables.name: X402_FEE_PAYER_SOLANA

environmentVariables.description: x402 facilitator endpoint for payment verification and settlement. Defaults to https://facilitator.payai.network.
environmentVariables.name: X402_FACILITATOR_URL

title: IBM Granite via x402
